name: sdlc-orchestrator
description: Stack-agnostic SDLC orchestration for Claude Code: 18 agents, 28 skills, 30 slash commands, 3 hooks. Enforces CLAUDE.md global rules across spec → plan → impl → review → test → release plus common SE practices (ADR, threat modeling, performance, dependencies, tech debt, incidents, CI/CD). Parallel orchestration with a Challenger Panel (consensus-auto) lowers human-interaction frequency; a cross-feature merge-queue assigns serial version tags at merge time; background-job tracking enables async dispatch/collect with in-flight visibility; an i18n layer (SDLC_LANG) localizes human-facing output to zh/en/bilingual.
